records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Fieldwork really is exhausting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Fieldwork really is exhausting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Fieldwork really is exhausting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The good thing today was the company-wide vacation. At this rate, I wouldn't be surprised if I just collapsed one of these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The good thing today was the company-wide vacation. At this rate, I wouldn't be surprised if I just collapsed one of these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The good thing today was the company-wide vacation. At this rate, I wouldn't be surprised if I just collapsed one of these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Things are tight this month too. Maybe I should catch up writing on my ledger...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Things are tight this month too. Maybe I should catch up writing on my ledger...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Things are tight this month too. Maybe I should catch up writing on my ledger...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's an emergency, everyone! Stop what you're doing and gather at the company immediately!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's an emergency, everyone! Stop what you're doing and gather at the company immediately!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's an emergency, everyone! Stop what you're doing and gather at the company immediately!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you there, the one who was just idling around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you there, the one who was just idling around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you there, the one who was just idling around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Mina. The steam will conveniently censor certain areas of your body due to our age rating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Mina. The steam will conveniently censor certain areas of your body due to our age rating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Mina. The steam will conveniently censor certain areas of your body due to our age rating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, relax and continue your shower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, relax and continue your shower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, relax and continue your shower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop spouting nonsense and end comms!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop spouting nonsense and end comms!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop spouting nonsense and end comms!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, was it really necessary to use video comms to contact me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, was it really necessary to use video comms to contact me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, was it really necessary to use video comms to contact me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There wasn't much of a choice, so please understand. After all, didn't you silence all notifications because of the company-wide vacation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There wasn't much of a choice, so please understand. After all, didn't you silence all notifications because of the company-wide vacation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There wasn't much of a choice, so please understand. After all, didn't you silence all notifications because of the company-wide vacation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to mention, Mina has been enjoying her day off until now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to mention, Mina has been enjoying her day off until now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to mention, Mina has been enjoying her day off until now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you think I felt, being stopped just as I was about to head home after working late?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you think I felt, being stopped just as I was about to head home after working late?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you think I felt, being stopped just as I was about to head home after working late?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cut the jokes and get to the point. What's this emergency about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cut the jokes and get to the point. What's this emergency about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cut the jokes and get to the point. What's this emergency about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, the truth is, we've received a request for cooperation from the Ground One Administration regarding the recent Corruption Disaster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, the truth is, we've received a request for cooperation from the Ground One Administration regarding the recent Corruption Disaster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, the truth is, we've received a request for cooperation from the Ground One Administration regarding the recent Corruption Disaster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not finished yet, so hear me out! If that were all, I wouldn't have called you all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not finished yet, so hear me out! If that were all, I wouldn't have called you all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not finished yet, so hear me out! If that were all, I wouldn't have called you all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It all began... yes, just a few days ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It all began... yes, just a few days ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It all began... yes, just a few days ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure if you know this, but I happen to have pretty sharp ears.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure if you know this, but I happen to have pretty sharp ears.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure if you know this, but I happen to have pretty sharp ears.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I realized that this phenomenon was anything but ordinary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I realized that this phenomenon was anything but ordinary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I realized that this phenomenon was anything but ordinary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before the Corruption worsened, Machination G.A.P. was dispatched for investigation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before the Corruption worsened, Machination G.A.P. was dispatched for investigation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before the Corruption worsened, Machination G.A.P. was dispatched for investigation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this Machination G.A.P.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this Machination G.A.P.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this Machination G.A.P.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a prototype equipped with an autonomous ship control module. I deployed it to the Counterside Effect as part of its operational test.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a prototype equipped with an autonomous ship control module. I deployed it to the Counterside Effect as part of its operational test.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a prototype equipped with an autonomous ship control module. I deployed it to the Counterside Effect as part of its operational test.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take a look at this. These are the analyzed data of the signature pattern from the Counterside Effect that's been officially reported.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take a look at this. These are the analyzed data of the signature pattern from the Counterside Effect that's been officially reported.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take a look at this. These are the analyzed data of the signature pattern from the Counterside Effect that's been officially reported.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And here is the data we gathered internally about dimensional phenomena by using Machination G.A.P.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And here is the data we gathered internally about dimensional phenomena by using Machination G.A.P.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And here is the data we gathered internally about dimensional phenomena by using Machination G.A.P.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This... is completely different from the Administration's data!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This... is completely different from the Administration's data!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This... is completely different from the Administration's data!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no reason for the Administration to provide incorrect information... So could it mean there's an unknown variable that hasn't been accounted for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no reason for the Administration to provide incorrect information... So could it mean there's an unknown variable that hasn't been accounted for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no reason for the Administration to provide incorrect information... So could it mean there's an unknown variable that hasn't been accounted for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Even Machination G.A.P., designed to withstand high-level Corruption rays, has gone missing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Even Machination G.A.P., designed to withstand high-level Corruption rays, has gone missing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Even Machination G.A.P., designed to withstand high-level Corruption rays, has gone missing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've made some arrangements, but we must still be ready for anything unexpected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've made some arrangements, but we must still be ready for anything unexpected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've made some arrangements, but we must still be ready for anything unexpected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to ask this on the company-wide vacation, but I need the two of you to investigate the Corruption storm.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to ask this on the company-wide vacation, but I need the two of you to investigate the Corruption storm.
